prompts.prompt: Stressed software developer in modern tech office, multiple monitors showing error code, professional lighting, photorealistic style, realistic professional, frustrated expression, cinematic portrait photography, 8k resolution

prompts.segment_text: You're building an AI system, and it starts spiraling out of control.
prompts.prompt: Chaotic desk with scattered code printouts, red error messages on screens, overwhelmed developer, office environment, professional lighting, photorealistic, stressed, professional cinematography

prompts.segment_text: Code everywhere. No direction. Tests failing.
prompts.prompt: Developer looking at blank screen with no clear direction, hopeful but confused, tech startup environment, natural light from windows, photorealistic, cinematic depth of field
Developer having realization moment, light bulb icon above head, developer, tech office environment, dramatic lighting, photorealistic, excited, epic shot
